# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE: "checksums.txt"
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: '.secure_files'

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils
  script:
    - mkdir -p build/bin build/config
    - echo "Building application binary..."
    - echo "#!/bin/sh" > build/bin/app
    - echo 'echo "Application v1.0.0"' >> build/bin/app
    - chmod +x build/bin/app
    - echo "Creating configuration files..."
    - echo "APP_ENV=production" > build/config/app.conf
    - echo "LOG_LEVEL=info" >> build/config/app.conf
    - echo "Generating artifact checksums..."
    - find build -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - cat ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - build/
      - ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils
  script:
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Running tests on artifacts..."
    - test -f build/bin/app || exit 1
    - test -x build/bin/app || exit 1
    - test -f build/config/app.conf || exit 1
    - echo "Validating configuration format..."
    - grep -q "APP_ENV=production" build/config/app.conf || exit 1
    - echo "All tests passed"
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils openssh-client rsync
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity before deployment..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/staging
    - cp -r build/* /tmp/staging/
    - echo "Validating deployment artifacts..."
    - test -f /tmp/staging/bin/app || exit 1
    - test -x /tmp/staging/bin/app || exit 1
    - /tmp/staging/bin/app
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed successfully"
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop
    - main
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils openssh-client rsync
    - echo "Verifying artifact integrity before production deployment..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/production
    - cp -r build/* /tmp/production/
    - echo "Validating production deployment artifacts..."
    - test -f /tmp/production/bin/app || exit 1
    - test -x /tmp/production/bin/app || exit 1
    - echo "Running production health checks..."
    - /tmp/production/bin/app
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

download_artifacts:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils
  script:
    - echo "Verifying downloaded artifacts..."
    - sha256sum -c ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    - echo "Artifacts available for team access:"
    - find build -type f -ls
    - echo "Artifact integrity verified - safe for team use"
  artifacts:
    name: "team-access-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - build/
      - ${ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_FILE}
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker
